reason: Agent successfully used browser tools to navigate to https://example.com and reported the correct page title "Example Domain"

Clicked on "QA-20260616-174354-atho" agent in the sidebar — Agent interface loaded, chat input field displayed, agent status changed to "working"
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat input field — Message appeared in the textbox and was ready to send

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response confirmed: "The page title is 'Example Domain'." and "Done — the page at https://example.com loaded and its title/heading is 'Example Domain'. Browser closed."
Took screenshot of final state — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with agent's response including the "Example Domain" mention and browser tool activity
